examples.title: Use Str and Arr helpers for tidy string and array work
examples.scenario: You need string truncation or array column extraction without rolling helpers each time.

examples.title: Register a singleton and resolve it via the container
examples.scenario: Bind a service constructor to the DI container so it can be resolved with its dependencies auto-wired.

examples.title: Build an immutable cookie value object
examples.scenario: Construct a Cookie, derive a new value from it without mutating the original — the framework's readonly-everywhere posture in miniature.

examples.title: Record an event and read it back through the Reader
examples.scenario: Capture a structured mutation in the agent-readable event log, then assert against it from a test or follow-up step.

examples.title: List and read examples programmatically (not via CLI)
examples.scenario: Build a custom agent surface, doc generator, or CI gate that walks the example library and reasons about each entry.

examples.title: Dispatch a domain event and react to it
examples.scenario: A domain operation completes; you want one or more side effects to fire without coupling them to the caller.

examples.title: Use Map and Vector for typed in-memory collections
examples.scenario: You need keyed lookup with insertion order or a contiguous sequence — without the gotchas of bare PHP arrays.
